page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.120xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 480 dedicated physical cores utilizing Intel Xeon 8490H processors running at a base frequency of 1.9 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance provides 480 vCPUs. It is equipped with 8192.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 17.07 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include any bundled local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 128 Gbps. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the massive memory-to-core ratio and high physical core count position this instance as a premium, resource-dense option designed to consolidate massive workloads onto a single physical footprint, trading off local storage availability for extreme memory capacity.

The ecs.re8.120xlarge is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Suitable use cases include large-scale in-memory databases, massive SAP HANA deployments, heavy enterprise resource planning systems, and large-scale data analytics pipelines that require caching massive datasets entirely in system memory.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.120xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 480 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8490H processors running at 1.9 GHz with a single thread per core. The instance is equipped with 8192.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 17.07 GB per core. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 128 Gbps. This resource-dense configuration is designed for massive memory-intensive workloads, making it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise ERP systems, and heavy data analytics pipelines.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.120xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 480 dedicated Intel Xeon 8490H cores, 8192 GB of RAM, and 128 Gbps network bandwidth for massive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A massive memory-optimized instance featuring four hundred eighty dedicated cores and eight terabytes of RAM for enterprise in-memory workloads.

8192.0 GB of system memory providing 17.07 GB of RAM per core
